designs.title: Royal Gold Wedding Mandap
designs.description: A grand golden mandap with floral drapes, crystal chandeliers and royal throne chairs. Perfect for a regal South Indian wedding ceremony.

designs.title: Pastel Balloon Birthday Setup
designs.description: A soft pastel balloon arch with customized name board, photo backdrop and cake table decoration. Great for kids and adults alike.

designs.title: Pink Dream Baby Shower
designs.description: A dreamy pink and white baby shower setup with balloon canopy, flower wall and customized welcome board.

designs.title: Traditional Puberty Ceremony
designs.description: Traditional South Indian puberty function setup with banana leaf decoration, flower garlands, traditional kolam and sacred ambiance.

designs.title: Midnight Surprise Party
designs.description: A dramatic midnight-themed surprise party with black and gold balloons, fairy lights and a special entrance curtain effect.

designs.title: Rose Gold Engagement Setup
designs.description: An elegant rose gold engagement backdrop with fresh roses, couple initials and a romantic candlelight ambiance.
